sad_paths_walked: Direct deep-link open /tapix/tasks/board -> Board active, 3 columns render, no error
Dark mode + 390px viewport: switcher legible (computed style) and fits without overflow
journeys.evidence: shots/j1-tasks-list.png (switcher inline, List active), shots/j1-tasks-board.png (Board active, To do/In progress/Done)

sad_paths_walked: Direct deep-link open /tapix/opportunities/board -> board renders (Prospecting/Qualification/Needs Analysis), NOT swallowed by /{record}, no error
journeys.evidence: shots/j2-opp-board-deeplink.png; opp list switcher confirmed List-active

sad_paths_walked: Empty 'Done' column renders 'No records in this column' without error
Zero-options state: covered by new unit test (board + list heading render OK with all status options deleted); state UI-unreachable (options Repeater requires >=1, system fields protected)
x-sortable Alpine init verified on all 3 columns AFTER an SPA wire:navigate switcher transition
LIVE moveCard: br-rel-336-drag created via board UI, moved To do -> In progress through the board component's moveCard wire method; DOM + DB + j3-movecard-live.png
journeys.evidence: board columns render from status/stage options; cards in correct columns with priority/amount/due date; j3-movecard-live.png (live move), j4-dark-board.png (dark mode), j5-mobile-390.png (390px fits)

sad_paths_walked: Re-inspected sidebar after navigation -> still single Tasks/Opportunities entries, boardOrphan=false
journeys.evidence: sidebar = Home, People, Companies, Opportunities, Tasks, Notes (no Board sub-entries)

sad_paths_walked: Logged-out hit of /tapix/tasks/board -> 302 to /login (auth-gated, no leak)
Cross-tenant probe: authenticated tapix owner requested /abcd/tasks/board (non-member team) -> 404 Not Found, no cross-team data
journeys.evidence: positive gate confirmed (switcher shows because tapix has status/stage field); tenant isolation holds on new board route

frontier_not_reached.item: bin/setup-workspace.sh provisioning change (blank APP_PANEL_DOMAIN + config/route clear)
frontier_not_reached.why_unreached: Dev-tooling for Polyscope workspace clones; not reachable through the product browser and provisioning a fresh clone is outside this run
frontier_not_reached.how_to_close: Provision one fresh Polyscope workspace with the script; confirm the app panel serves at <workspace>.test/app and login works

frontier_not_reached.item: Physical pointer drag gesture (pointerdown/move/up) on a board card
frontier_not_reached.why_unreached: agent-browser lacks a reliable drag primitive; the moveCard wire endpoint (what the gesture dispatches) was live-verified and x-sortable Alpine init confirmed post-SPA-transition — only the raw pointer binding is unobserved (unchanged vendor code)
frontier_not_reached.how_to_close: Manual 5-second drag of the br-rel-336-drag card, or dispatch synthetic pointer events across columns

frontier_not_reached.item: Keyboard-only walk of the switcher (Tab focus ring + Enter activation)
frontier_not_reached.why_unreached: Synthetic focus() does not trigger :focus-visible; native <a> elements with aria-current/aria-label make the risk low
frontier_not_reached.how_to_close: 5-second manual check: Tab to the switcher, confirm focus ring, Enter navigates to Board
